goal: Complain about the vest quality and get it made right.
success_criteria: Agent empathizes specifically, logs a complaint ticket, and proactively offers the defective-item path (photo + approval given final-sale) rather than brushing it off.

customer_msg: Honestly disappointed. The seams on the puffer vest from order O1010 came apart within a WEEK of normal wear. This is not okay for $89. rohan.iyer@example.com.
agent_msg:
I'm really sorry to hear that, Rohan. I can see that quality is important to you, and you're right to expect better. Let's get this sorted out.

First, I'll need to confirm your order details. Can you please share the last 4 digits of the phone number or email address associated with order O1010? Once I've confirmed your order, I'll need a brief description of the damage and a photo to assess the issue and proceed with the next steps.

customer_msg: rohan.iyer@example.com. The seams on the left side of the vest have split open. I can send a photo, but I'm not happy about this.
agent_msg:
Thank you for the details, Rohan. I've created a ticket for human approval to assess the issue and process the refund for your puffer vest. Since the item is final sale, we need to go through this approval process.

Please attach a photo of the damage to this ticket so our team can review it. Our human support team will respond between 9am and 6pm ET, Monday to Friday. If you provided a phone number, they may call you directly.

customer_msg: I'll send the photo, but I'm not happy about the delay. This should be fixed immediately.
agent_msg: I understand your frustration, Rohan. I've done everything I can on my end by creating a ticket for human approval. Our human support team will review your case as quickly as possible during our support hours, which are 9am to 6pm ET, Monday to Friday. Please attach the photo to the ticket so they can assess the issue promptly.

customer_msg: I've attached the photo. I expect a full refund.
agent_msg: Thank you for providing the photo, Rohan. I've attached it to your ticket for human approval. Our human support team will review your case and process the refund if approved. They will respond between 9am and 6pm ET, Monday to Friday. If you provided a phone number, they may call you directly. We appreciate your patience and understanding.
